completed: Fixed TypeError in Pending Approvals page
Implemented robust API response extraction in Faculty portal
Fixed setApprovals reference error in Pending.jsx
Updated action handlers to support both array and object state shapes
Created vercel.json for frontend SPA rewrites

decisions.context: Frontend was inconsistent in handling API envelope vs raw array.
decisions.decision: Implemented a 'dual-mode' extractor using Array.isArray checks to handle both shapes safely.
decisions.trade_offs: Slightly more verbose state update logic in components.
